character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: Associated with a home-made coracle constructed from goat-skins, hidden in a hollow on Treasure Island.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: Captain of the ship HISPANIOLA, referenced in the context of being opposed by the narrator's plan to cut the ship adrift.

character_dossiers.name: the man with the red cap
character_dossiers.biography: A member of a group that retreated below deck after being repulsed, associated with the mutineers on Treasure Island.

character_dossiers.name: his comrade
character_dossiers.biography: A companion to the man with the red cap, part of the group that retreated below deck on the ship.
